title: [Rhyaesdid Hall, Citizen Lounge]
description: Sunlight bathes the octagonal lounge in hues of green and blue as it filters through the stained glass skylight overhead.  Several white trellises boasting varieties of clematis vines span across seven of the room's walls, leaving the one with a blue tanik door otherwise bare.  Surrounding a bed of goblin gold moss are multiple flyrsilk pillows in various sizes and hues arranged in a chaotic array as they line the floor.
